items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a persona scenario related to token rotation requirements. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how token rotation is implemented or validated within the system. The lack of specific details or examples means that it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps.
